name: Greenlane Holdings, Inc.
summary: Greenlane Holdings, Inc. (GNLN) is a company that has undergone a strategic shift, now pursuing a digital asset treasury policy centered on BERA cryptocurrency and the BERA ecosystem. The filing references forward-looking strategies around digital assets, Nasdaq compliance, and cryptocurrency volatility, suggesting a transition away from its prior consumer products business toward a crypto-focused treasury and investment model.
